items.title: Model selection with CV on the development set
items.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  dev["Development data train+val"] --> split["CV splitter e.g. 5-fold"]
  split --> c1["Candidate A: mean metric across folds"]
  split --> c2["Candidate B: mean metric across folds"]
  c1 --> pick["Pick stable winner low std"]
  c2 --> pick
  pick --> refit["Refit winner on full dev set"]
  refit --> testOnce["Evaluate once on locked test"]
items.caption: CV compares candidates on rotating folds; the test set stays locked until after selection.

items.title: Nested CV: inner tune, outer score
items.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  outerFold["Outer fold: held-out test T"] --> innerPool["Outer train pool R"]
  innerPool --> innerCV["Inner CV on R: grid search hyperparams"]
  innerCV --> bestHP["Best setting from inner mean only"]
  bestHP --> refitOuter["Refit on all of R with best setting"]
  refitOuter --> scoreT["Score once on outer test T"]
  scoreT --> outerMean["Report mean of outer fold scores"]
items.caption: Inner CV mitigates overfitting to one validation slice during tuning; outer folds produce the generalization estimate.
